problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
